subject: Server downtime issue
description: My VPS server has been down for the last 2 hours. I need urgent assistance as this is affecting my business operations.

messages.content: My VPS server has been down for the last 2 hours. I need urgent assistance as this is affecting my business operations.
We are investigating the issue. Our team is working on it and we'll provide an update shortly.
We found the issue. There was a network configuration problem. We're fixing it now. Estimated resolution time: 30 minutes.

subject: Domain transfer help
description: I need help transferring my domain from GoDaddy to your service. The domain is acme.com.

messages.content: I need help transferring my domain from GoDaddy to your service. The domain is acme.com.
We can help you with that. Please provide your domain name and current registrar.
Thank you! We've initiated the transfer process. You should receive an email shortly with confirmation instructions.
